_comment: UK universities and higher-education buying consortia. Hand-curated 2026-04-28 from the Office for Students Register, Scottish Funding Council list, HEFCW list, Department for the Economy NI list, and the Russell Group membership. Aliases captured from real Find a Tender Service publisher name variants in pwin-competitive-intel/db/bid_intel.db. Where bodies already exist on the master list (APUC, College of Policing), this file appends new aliases via canonical_id merge rather than creating duplicates. NHS university hospital trusts are intentionally excluded — they are NHS bodies, already canonical in nhs-organisations.json. Oxford and Cambridge constituent colleges are intentionally excluded for v1 — only the federal university entries are included; constituent colleges may be added later if dossier work shows the granularity is needed. Further-education colleges (FE), sixth-form colleges, academy trusts, and Royal Colleges of professional bodies (Royal College of Surgeons etc.) are out of scope: those are not degree-awarding higher-education providers.
